footer.tagline: Full-Stack Developer & UI/UX Designer crafting digital experiences that move people.

hero.heading: Crafting Digital Experiences That Move People
hero.name: Alex Rivera
hero.body: I turn complex problems into elegant, high-performance products. From pixel-perfect interfaces to scalable backend systems — I build things that feel as good as they work.
hero.description: I design and develop modern web experiences that blend aesthetics with functionality.

featuredProjects.heading: Projects I'm Proud Of
featuredProjects.body: A curated look at the projects spanning product design, web applications, and creative experiments.

skills.heading: What I Bring to the Table
skills.body: A full-spectrum toolkit built over 6+ years of shipping real products — from design systems to distributed APIs.

ctaBanner.heading: Have a project in mind?
ctaBanner.body: I'm currently open to freelance projects and full-time opportunities. Let's talk about what we can build together.

about.heading: Hey, I'm Alex.
about.body: I live at the intersection of code and craft — where technical precision meets visual storytelling.
about.story1: I started writing code at 16, building clunky fan sites that nobody visited — and I've never really stopped. Over the past six years I've worked with early-stage startups, boutique design agencies, and Fortune 500 product teams, shipping everything from zero-to-one MVPs to large-scale platform redesigns.
about.story2: I believe great digital products are born when engineering rigour and design empathy share the same seat at the table. That's the philosophy I bring to every engagement — whether I'm architecting a data pipeline or obsessing over a 4 px spacing inconsistency in a component library.
about.story3: When I'm not in front of a screen, you'll find me hiking mountain trails, shooting film photography, or deep in a rabbit hole about generative art and creative coding.
about.skillsBody: The tools I reach for every day — and the ones I pull out when the problem demands it.
about.socialBody: Whether you want to see my code, read my thoughts, or just say hello — here's where I hang out.
about.imageAlt: Alex Rivera — Full-Stack Developer & UI/UX Designer

connect.heading: Ready to collaborate?
connect.subheading: I'm always interested in hearing about new projects and opportunities.

about.intro: I'm a designer and developer passionate about creating thoughtful digital experiences. With a focus on clean design and functional code, I help brands tell their story through the web.
about.pullquote: I craft digital experiences that balance aesthetics with functionality, turning complex ideas into intuitive interfaces.

projects.body: Six years of work distilled into the pieces that challenged me most, taught me the most, and — honestly — look the best.
projects.ctaBody: I take on a limited number of freelance projects each quarter to keep quality high. If your timeline works, let's talk.

contact.heading: Let's Build Something.
contact.body: Whether it's a product idea, a collaboration, or just a question — my inbox is open. I typically reply within 24 hours.
contact.formBody: Fill in the details below and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.formNote: I read every message personally. No bots, no auto-responders — just a real reply from me.
